title: Capability-bound post-merge closeout persistence

sha_binding.verified_source_note: Authoritative implementation merge SHA for PR #1300, rebound with ops:proof-generate --merge-sha. This proof-only continuation PR is not the implementation source of truth.

verifier.note: Mechanical checks only. Not independent Griff review, t1-approved, or a pm-verdict/v1 owner artifact. Requires normal T1 merge authority (t1-approved label + pm-verdict/v1 APPROVED comment) to land -- no admin or required-check override.

problem.root_cause: guardRepairAgainstMainCheckout() (UTV2-1542) blocks any checkout literally on the `main` branch from persisting --repair-merged's tracked-file changes, as a defense against a real prior incident (an operator committing repaired state directly to main from a shared checkout). But actions/checkout@v4 on a `push` trigger leaves a real local branch named `main` (not a detached HEAD) -- so post-merge-lane-close.yml, the one workflow this guard exists to let operate safely on `main`, was itself always blocked by it.
problem.proof_of_defect: PR #1296 (UTV2-1571's own lane-close manifest repair) merged as d9a3661e and triggered post-merge-lane-close.yml run 30002061214. The 'Run lane closeout' step's ops:lane-close --repair-merged --explain call returned code=repair_required_via_pr, remediation='...produced tracked-file changes (docs/06_status/lanes/UTV2-1571.json) while running from a checkout on main. This is blocked...'. The workflow failed, and UTV2-1571's manifest was never closed -- independently confirmed via `gh api repos/griff843/Unit-Talk-v2/actions/jobs/89189303115/logs`.
problem.consequence: Every governance lane merged since this guard shipped stayed at its pre-merge manifest status (started/in_review, commit_sha:null) despite being merged on GitHub. Because ops:lane-start's admission check counts these stale-active manifests against the governance type-cap, normal admission for new governance lanes -- including this lane's own admission -- became deadlocked. PM authorized manual branch creation as a narrow, one-time admission exception (recorded in docs/06_status/lanes/UTV2-1576.json's admission_exception block) to land the fix that closes this loop; no other lane-start control was waived.

fix.capability: isTrustedPostMergeAutomation() in scripts/ops/lane-close.ts -- returns true only when ALL of the following hold simultaneously: the explicit --post-merge-trusted CLI flag was passed, GITHUB_ACTIONS=='true', GITHUB_REPOSITORY=='griff843/Unit-Talk-v2', GITHUB_REF=='refs/heads/main', and GITHUB_WORKFLOW_REF matches '.github/workflows/post-merge-lane-close.yml@refs/heads/main'. Any single missing marker fails closed. Never keyed on actor identity (github.actor varies between push and workflow_dispatch and is not checked at all).
fix.wiring: guardRepairAgainstMainCheckout() accepts a pre-evaluated trustedPostMerge boolean and returns null (no block) only when it is true; every existing call site and test that does not pass it behaves identically to before this change. post-merge-lane-close.yml's 'Run lane closeout' step now passes --post-merge-trusted.
fix.scope_guard: A new 'Fail closed on unexpected tracked changes' workflow step runs after lane-close succeeds and before anything is staged: it asserts via `git status --porcelain` that only the closing issue's own manifest, proof directory, and per-issue sync file are dirty, and aborts without committing if anything else is dirty.
fix.recursive_trigger_guard: Pre-existing, unmodified: `if: github.actor != 'github-actions[bot]' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'` on the job already prevents the bot's own bookkeeping commit from re-triggering another closeout run.

pnpm_verify.note: Full run including lint, type-check, build, all unit suites, live pnpm test:db, and live pnpm test:t1-proof:live. Zero '# fail' lines above 0 and zero 'not ok' lines across the entire run.

unit_tests_lane_close.note: 69 pre-existing tests (unchanged, still passing -- confirms no regression to the UTV2-1542 guard's default-blocked behavior) + 11 new UTV2-1576 tests covering isTrustedPostMergeAutomation() and the guard's trustedPostMerge parameter.

r_level.command: pnpm exec tsx scripts/ci/r-level-check.ts --base origin/main --head HEAD

runtime_proof.note: Fresh live database-smoke suite (apps/api/src/database-smoke.test.ts) against real Supabase (zfzdnfwdarxucxtaojxm): 7 tests, 7 pass, 0 fail. The suite's temporary rows are removed by its verified cleanup hooks. Also ran pnpm test:t1-proof:live after this capture; all invoked invariant proof files passed, with one stale-provider-data assertion skipped by its explicit test contract.

queries.description: live-DB smoke persistence, lifecycle transitions, cleanup
live-DB smoke submission persistence and cleanup
live lifecycle inserts and rejected-transition count assertions
live additive settlement and correction assertions
live rollback and additive settlement audit assertions

runtime_proof.row_counts_method: Read-only Supabase JS HEAD requests using select('*', { count: 'exact', head: true }) with the configured service-role client; no rows were selected or mutated.

reconciliation_verification.note: This lane's own capability fix was independently re-verified against the three lanes it reconciles.
excluded_untouched: UTV2-1574 (remains started, its own R1/R2 proof gap unresolved -- reverted to exact main content in this lane, no fabricated proof)

not_changed: UTV2-1571 manifest, proof, or sync files
UTV2-1574 manifest or proof (reverted to exact main content)

acceptance_criteria.requires_github_actions_true_refs_heads_: PASS -- isTrustedPostMergeAutomation() checks all three plus GITHUB_REPOSITORY
acceptance_criteria.local_main_ordinary_automation_forged_or: PASS -- covered by 11 new regression tests
acceptance_criteria.trusted_context_persists_only_expected_b: PASS -- pre-existing targeted git add calls plus new fail-closed scope guard
acceptance_criteria.bot_commits_cannot_recursively_trigger_c: PASS -- pre-existing actor guard, unmodified, verified present
acceptance_criteria.repair_binds_utv2_1571_to_pr_1291_merge_: DEFERRED -- UTV2-1571 intentionally untouched by this lane per PM instruction; to be verified by replaying Post-Merge Lane Close for UTV2-1571 after this PR merges
acceptance_criteria.after_merge_replay_utv2_1571_and_verify_: PENDING -- post-merge follow-up action, not part of this proof

known_gaps: UTV2-1571 is not closed by this PR -- it remains the sole active governance lane, to be closed by replaying the now-fixed Post-Merge Lane Close workflow after this PR merges, per PM instruction.
UTV2-1574's own R1/R2 runtime-proof gap (missing structured queries/row-counts) is unresolved and out of scope for this lane -- its manifest and proof are reverted to exact main content, not touched.

This proof's head_sha/verified_source_sha is the pre-proof-commit branch head (circular-reference workaround, same pattern as UTV2-1573/1575's own proof) -- rebound to the true merge SHA by ops:proof-generate --merge-sha post-merge.
